The '''Hutt Command Center''' was the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] [[Hutt Cartel/Legends|Cartel's]] main base of operations on [[Nal Hutta/Legends|Nal Hutta]] and [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. The Building was made up of a main palace, there where also four towers around the outside to offer the main building protection from attack.

{{Struct-stub}}
